docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY (ROMANOV), EOWYN AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH CONSULATE - GENERAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-30-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH CONSULATE - GENERAL
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF - CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. BOTH PARTIES APPEARED. CLERK: BPAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF (ROMANOV), EOWYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRITISH CONSULATE - GENERAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
